product.name: Buzz Bites Focus + Energy Popcorn Clusters
product.category: Health Foods > Functional Snacks > Energy Snacks
product.description: Popcorn clusters infused with natural caffeine for clean, focused energy. Clusters of air-popped popcorn, peanut butter drizzle, and cacao nibs enhanced with green coffee extract and ginseng. Crafted for Gen Z productivity moments -- study marathons, late-night projects, creative bursts. Each serving offers a balanced sweet-salty crunch with a clean uplift, no jitters.

competitors.name: Red Bull
competitors.key_feature: Iconic energy drink with 80mg caffeine per can for quick alertness and focus

competitors.name: Boom Chicka Pop
competitors.key_feature: Light, crunchy kettle corn made with simple ingredients and no artificial flavors

competitors.name: Skinny Pop
competitors.key_feature: Pure popped perfection with just three ingredients: popcorn, oil, and salt
